meta.title: Pass The Plate — Marketplace for Asian F&B Businesses
meta.description: The first marketplace for the $240B+ Asian F&B transition. Buy and sell Asian-owned restaurants, grocery, manufacturing, and more.
meta.ogDescription: The first marketplace for the $240B+ Asian F&B transition.

bottomCta.buyTitle: Find A Business You're Hungry For
bottomCta.sellTitle: Pass The Plate To The Right Hands

signin.title: Sign in
signin.subhead: We'll email you a one-time link — no password required.
signin.sentBody: Magic link sent to {email}. Open it on this device.
signin.successToast: Magic link sent — check your inbox.

listings.metaDescription: Asian F&B businesses for sale — restaurants, grocery, manufacturing. Verified listings from operators ready to pass the plate.
listings.subhead: Verified Asian F&B businesses on the market today — vetted by our team, delivered straight to you.

empty.noMatchesBody: Try removing a filter, or reset to see everything.
empty.emptyBody: Check back soon — sellers are adding listings every week.

listingDetail.notFoundTitle: Listing not found — Pass The Plate
listingDetail.verifiedBuyersNote: We verify every buyer before connecting them with sellers.

sell.metaTitle: Sell Your Business — Pass The Plate
sell.metaDescription: Meet buyers who respect your recipes, your team, and your legacy. Pass The Plate handles diligence, introductions, and structuring from first call to close.
sell.subhead: Meet buyers who respect your recipes, your team, and your legacy. We handle diligence, introductions, and structuring from first call to close — so you can focus on the handoff.
sell.freeNote: $0 upfront. We only earn when you sell.
sell.feature1Body: Every buyer who reaches out has been pre-qualified on funds and intent. No tire-kickers, no looky-loos.
sell.feature2Body: We coordinate NDAs, financials, lease review, staff retention, and vendor intros. You choose when to pick up the phone.
sell.feature3Body: Built for Asian F&B operators, by operators and attorneys who've closed these deals before. Your story stays intact.
sell.step1Body: Save and come back as often as you want. Only you can see it.
sell.step2Body: Our team reviews every listing for accuracy and presentation.
sell.step3Body: Once approved, your listing goes live to verified buyers.
sell.step4Body: We introduce warm leads. You control every conversation.

sellNew.subhead: Just the essentials to get moving — you can fill in financials and the story on the next step.
sellNew.heroImageHelp: Your best shot of the space — this is the first thing buyers see.
sellNew.draftPrivate: Drafts are private — only you can see them.

sellListings.heading: Your listings
sellListings.subhead: Drafts, in-review, and live listings — all in one place.
sellListings.emptyBody: Start your first listing in about 90 seconds.

sellInquiries.subhead: We verify every buyer before sending an intro. You'll get an email when we do.
sellInquiries.emptyBody: Once your listing is live, we'll collect buyer interest here.
sellInquiries.buyerHidden: Buyer identity is hidden until our team verifies them.

account.emptySavedBody: Tap the heart on any listing to save it for later.

accountSettings.subhead: Choose how you hear from us. Toasts appear in the app when you're signed in; email is nice if you live out of your inbox.
accountSettings.digestBody: One email per day summarizing anything you haven't read yet. Skipped on days without activity.

contactSeller.successBody: We'll verify and intro you. Keep an eye on your inbox.
contactSeller.label: Message to seller
contactSeller.placeholder: Hi — I'm interested in {name}. A bit about me: …
contactSeller.verifyNote: We verify every buyer before sending them to the seller.
